name: Allegany Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Allegany Community Center in Salamanca, NY! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Olean YMCA
description: Olean YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Olean, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
